mapper.insert: insert into book_image (book_id, image_id, image_name, image_url, thumb_url, sort_order, image_type, image_status, create_staff_id, create_staff_name, created_at) values (#{bookId}, #{imageId}, #{imageName}, #{imageUrl}, #{thumbUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{imageType}, 0, #{createStaffId}, #{createStaffName}, now())
